description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story apartment building with a flat roof and a brick exterior. The front facade features a central entrance with a dark awning, flanked by symmetrically arranged windows, some of which are grouped in pairs or threes. The windows are outlined in a light trim, and the building's corners have subtle brickwork detailing. The side elevations have a more utilitarian appearance, with fewer and more vertically aligned windows. The rear of the building continues the brick motif and window pattern, but lacks an entrance. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of mid-20th-century urban residential architecture.
description: A three-story brick apartment building with a flat roof, symmetrical window arrangements, and a central front entrance. The design is simple and functional, with light-trimmed windows and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, a central large window above it, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows on all three floors.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a narrow facade with vertically stacked windows and no visible entrance.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a continuous brick wall with regularly spaced windows, lacking any doors or main entry features.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a similar narrow facade to the left, with vertically aligned windows and minimal detailing.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows across each floor, with some grouped in pairs or threes and evenly spaced both vertically and horizontally.
